classification.reasoning: The patch involves deep structural changes to the version compatibility and handshake logic across multiple core transport and versioning classes. It modifies the Version class to compute minimum compatibility versions dynamically, changes handshake request and response handling to include minimum compatibility versions, and updates transport layer classes to use these new semantics. The patch also includes extensive test updates and additions to verify the new compatibility logic. These changes reflect significant API divergence and refactoring rather than simple string replacements or formatting changes, indicating a TYPE_IV complexity. The confidence is high due to exact matches and pickaxe findings with high confidence, but not absolute due to the complexity of the changes. The token budget estimate is large due to the number of files and the depth of changes required to backport this patch.
